data.title: Havilah Releases Interim Half-Year Financial Report for 2026
data.description:

  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

The latest announcement is out from Havilah Resources Limited ( (AU:HAV) ).

Havilah Resources Limited has released its interim financial report for the half-year ended 31 January 2026, outlining the group’s consolidated financial performance, position and cash flows over the period. The report also details governance elements such as the directors’ report, auditor’s independence declaration and independent review, providing stakeholders with an update on the company’s financial health and compliance status.

The disclosure reiterates the high-risk, speculative nature of mineral exploration and development, noting that results can be materially affected by commodity prices, permitting, geology and broader economic and regulatory conditions. Havilah emphasises that its operational outlook and geological interpretations, including for projects like Kalkaroo, are subject to significant uncertainty, underscoring the need for investors to treat projections with caution.

More about Havilah Resources Limited

Havilah Resources Limited is an Australian mineral exploration and development company focused on projects in the Curnamona Province of South Australia. The company is primarily engaged in exploring and advancing copper, gold and related base metal deposits, including the Kalkaroo orebody, positioning itself within the resources sector as an early-stage to mid-stage project developer.

Average Trading Volume: 495,327

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: A$205.3M

data.description:

The latest update is out from Anteris Technologies ( (AU:AVR) ).

Anteris Technologies Global Corp. has issued a total of 20,000 unquoted restricted stock units (RSUs) under its employee incentive scheme, allocated in two equal tranches of 10,000 units on April 10 and April 13, 2026. The new RSUs, which will not be quoted on the ASX, underscore the company’s continued use of equity-based compensation to attract and retain key talent, aligning employee interests with long-term shareholder value.

The issuance of these unquoted incentives reflects Anteris’s ongoing reliance on share-based remuneration as it advances its cardiovascular technology portfolio in competitive global markets. While modest in size, the award further embeds performance-linked ownership among staff, which may support execution of the company’s growth strategy without immediate cash outlay or dilution in the quoted market.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:AVR) stock is a Buy with a A$13.00 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on Anteris Technologies stock, see the AU:AVR Stock Forecast page.

More about Anteris Technologies

Anteris Technologies Global Corp., listed on the ASX under the code AVR, operates in the medical technology sector, focusing on developing and commercializing innovative cardiovascular solutions. The company targets global healthcare markets with products designed to address structural heart disease and improve patient outcomes.

IODM Ltd. ( (AU:IOD) ) has issued an announcement.

IODM Ltd has notified the market of the issue of 1,000,000 unquoted convertible notes, to be treated as a new class of securities not intended for quotation on the ASX. The notes, issued on 10 April 2026, form part of the company’s broader capital management activities and may provide additional funding flexibility while diluting existing equity holders if converted in the future.

The transaction formalizes an earlier flagged capital move under a prior Appendix 3B and reflects IODM’s continued use of structured instruments to raise funds outside the quoted equity market. For investors, the unquoted nature of the notes concentrates liquidity in the company’s ordinary shares while introducing a future potential source of share issuance tied to note conversion terms.

The most recent analyst rating on (AU:IOD) stock is a Buy with a A$0.23 price target. To see the full list of analyst forecasts on IODM Ltd. stock, see the AU:IOD Stock Forecast page.

More about IODM Ltd.

IODM Ltd is an Australia-listed company trading under the ASX code IOD. While the announcement does not detail its operations, the company is engaged in corporate activities involving equity and debt securities, including the issuance of unquoted convertible notes to support its capital and funding structure.

data.title: Prosper Construction Formalizes Audit Committee Mandate to Strengthen Governance
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Prosper Construction Holdings Limited ( (HK:6816) ) has provided an announcement.

Prosper Construction Holdings Limited has set out formal terms of reference for its Audit Committee, originally established by a board resolution on 22 June 2016, detailing how members are appointed, removed, and structured to align with Hong Kong Listing Rules. The document specifies that the committee must comprise at least three non-executive directors, with a majority being independent and at least one possessing professional accounting or financial expertise, while also barring recent partners of the current auditing firm and formalizing procedures for convening meetings, notices and secretarial support to strengthen corporate governance.

Under the updated framework, the Audit Committee chairman must be an independent non-executive director appointed by the board or elected by committee members, and the company secretary will serve as the committee’s secretary unless a substitute is chosen for a specific meeting. These measures are designed to reinforce the independence, transparency and effectiveness of Prosper Construction’s financial oversight and audit processes, which may enhance investor confidence and compliance with regulatory standards.

More about Prosper Construction Holdings Limited

Prosper Construction Holdings Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company engaged in the construction sector. The group operates through a board comprising executive and non-executive directors, including independent non-executive directors, and is subject to the corporate governance and listing requirements of the Hong Kong Stock Exchange.

Average Trading Volume: 39,000

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$152M

data.title: FirstCape Lifts Stake in Summerset to Over 10%
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Summerset Group Holdings Limited ( (DE:20S) ) has issued an announcement.

FirstCape Group Limited has increased its substantial shareholding in Summerset Group Holdings to 26,155,699 ordinary shares, representing 10.714% of the company’s issued share capital, up from 9.676% previously. The move, achieved through a series of on-market trades and portfolio transfers executed by wholly owned subsidiaries including Harbour Asset Management, BNZ Investment Services, JBWere (NZ) and Consilium, signals strengthened institutional backing for Summerset and may be seen as a vote of confidence in the retirement village operator’s outlook and sector positioning.

The transactions involved significant on-market purchases and sales across the subsidiaries, leaving Harbour Asset Management with the largest portion at 8.870% of Summerset’s shares, followed by BNZ Investment Services, JBWere (NZ) and Consilium with smaller holdings. This consolidation of interests under FirstCape’s umbrella underscores the growing role of large asset managers in New Zealand’s listed retirement sector and could enhance Summerset’s shareholder base stability while potentially increasing its visibility among institutional investors.

More about Summerset Group Holdings Limited

Summerset Group Holdings Limited is a New Zealand-based retirement village operator focused on providing aged-care accommodation and related services. Its business centres on developing, owning and managing retirement communities, with revenue driven by unit sales, care services and ongoing village fees in the local market.

Learn more about 20S stock on TipRanks’ Stock Analysis page.

data.title: Neutech Controlling Shareholder Fully Releases Major Share Pledge
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Neusoft Education Technology Co. Limited ( (HK:9616) ) has issued an update.

Neutech Group Limited announced that its controlling shareholder’s subsidiaries, Dongkong First and Dongkong Second, have had all previously pledged shares in the company fully released and discharged as of 10 April 2026. These pledged shares, totaling 247,465,000 and once securing a RMB325.5 million loan, had represented about 38.30% of Neutech’s issued share capital at the time of the original pledge.

Following the release, Dongkong First and Dongkong Second now collectively hold approximately 39.29% of Neutech’s total issued shares, reaffirming the stability of the controlling shareholder’s position. The removal of the share pledge eases concerns over potential enforced disposals tied to loan covenants and may be viewed positively by investors monitoring the company’s ownership structure and governance risk profile.

More about Neusoft Education Technology Co. Limited

Neutech Group Limited is a Hong Kong-listed company incorporated in the Cayman Islands, operating through its subsidiaries and consolidated affiliated entities. The Group is controlled by Dalian Neusoft Holdings Co., Ltd., which holds its stake via wholly owned units Dongkong First and Dongkong Second, together representing a significant minority shareholding in the company.

Average Trading Volume: 170,900

Technical Sentiment Signal: Sell

Current Market Cap: HK$1.55B

New Hope Corporation Limited ( (AU:NHC) ) has shared an announcement.

New Hope Corporation Limited has confirmed details of its ordinary interim dividend for the six‑month period ended 31 January 2026, payable on its ordinary fully paid shares. The update specifically revises the Dividend Reinvestment Plan price associated with this interim payout, superseding information first released on 17 March 2026.

The record date for entitlement to the interim dividend remains 1 April 2026, with the ex‑dividend date set as 31 March 2026. By refining the DRP pricing while keeping the core timetable unchanged, the company provides greater clarity for shareholders choosing to reinvest, underscoring its ongoing capital management and shareholder‑return strategy.

data.title: Scales Delivers Record FY25 Results and Lifts Global Proteins Target
data.description:
Claim 30% Off TipRanks

  • Unlock hedge fund-level data and powerful investing tools for smarter, sharper decisions
  • Discover top-performing stock ideas and upgrade to a portfolio of market leaders with Smart Investor Picks

Scales Corp. Ltd. ( (NZ:SCL) ) has provided an announcement.

Scales Corporation reported record financial results for FY25, with Underlying EBITDA rising 50% to $137.6 million and Underlying NPAT attributable to shareholders up 82% to $61.8 million, driven by strong performances in Horticulture, Global Proteins and a record outcome from Logistics. The company also raised its FY27 Underlying EBITDA target for the Global Proteins division from $70 million to $85 million following increased stakes in Shelby, Meateor Australia, Fayman International and ANZ Exports, while refreshing its governance with board and finance leadership changes highlighted at its 2026 hybrid annual shareholders’ meeting in Christchurch.

More about Scales Corp. Ltd.

Scales Corporation is a diversified agribusiness group with three core divisions: Global Proteins, Horticulture and Logistics. Founded in 1897 as a shipping business, the company now operates across New Zealand, Australia, the United States and Europe, providing global operational exposure in protein, fresh produce and supply-chain services.

Average Trading Volume: 108,143

Technical Sentiment Signal: Buy

Current Market Cap: N$867.2M
